notes: Direct inspection covered every captured image bound by the candidate.
Final and no-post retain the same readable scene while differing in the authored output treatment.
Normal and emissive diagnostics isolate materially distinct signals and the diagnostic mosaic differs from final output.
Near, design, and far cameras preserve the intended subject envelope without invalid pixels.
The stress seed changes the procedural subject, the temporal pair changes motion state, and both reduced tiers remain readable.
The 641x359 odd-size capture is complete and shows no uncovered dispatch/readback region.
